SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem.model

Class Notification

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.database.NotificationSystem
com.example.eventlotterysystem.model.Notification
public class Notification extends NotificationSystem
Notification class, premade notification that is called instead of using notificationsystem directly. More efficient than writing allllll the messages in allll the functions.

    • notifyPrivateInvite

      public void notifyPrivateInvite(String entrantId, String eventId)
      Notification for private event. This also has it so that notification add the |ask| feature where it can open notification and have it auto ask on the dialog box.
      Parameters:
      entrantId -
      eventId -

    • notifyInvite

      public void notifyInvite(String entrantId, String eventId)
      Notification for event. This also has it so that notification add the |ask| feature where it can open notification and have it auto ask on the dialog box. Same same as private, but without the private.
      Parameters:
      entrantId -
      eventId -
